data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding selector types.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for selector types, which include specific record, credential type, and fact requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or examples that confirm the existence or implementation of these selector types. The linked use case mentions the need for selector types but lacks concrete evidence to support their coverage, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of selector types (specific record, credential type, fact requirement) in the credential request.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of selector types.
